free_text: Deuteron breakup with 3He at 89.4 and 118.9 MeV
Institute for Chemical Resarch
Hosoda Jutaku, 1-12-10, Santanda, Amagasaki
Faculty of Science
Faculty of General Education
- Beam intensity is less than 150 nA. (Several tens of
nA to 150 nA)
- Charge of incident ion is 2+.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is gas.
- Target-thickness: 2.95 atm
- Backing: Gass cell with windows of 10 micro-meter
Havar foil used
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Used as E and Delta-E detector
Used as E detector
